logo_fidelity.description: How well the logo is displayed. 5=perfect, 1=missing/broken.

colour_match.description: How well brand colours match the original site. 5=exact match, 1=completely wrong.

copy_accuracy.description: How accurate business copy is (name, services, about). 5=perfect, 1=placeholder/wrong.

layout_integrity.description: Page layout quality, no broken sections or overlaps. 5=perfect, 1=broken layout.

brand_cohesion.description: Overall feeling of brand consistency. 5=feels like real site, 1=generic template.

text_legibility.description: Text legibility against backgrounds. 5=all text perfectly legible, 1=significant unreadable text.

notes.description: Brief assessment of quality issues or strengths (2-3 sentences).
